Creates a new record in a Teable table.
Retrieves a list of records from a table: Retrieves a list of records from a table with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination.
Retrieves a single record from a table b: Retrieves a single record from a table by its ID.
Updates an existing record in a Teable t: Updates an existing record in a Teable table.
Deletes a record from a Teable table by: Deletes a record from a Teable table by its ID.
Uploads a file as an attachment to a fie: Uploads a file as an attachment to a field in a Teable record.
